SEARCH
Module ProjetGenieLogiciel
Package fr.projet.simulation

Class SimulationEngine

java.lang.Object
fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
public class SimulationEngine extends Object
Manages the execution of the simulation. The simulation engine maintains the graph, the agents, and the current simulation tick.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SimulationEngine(Graph graph)
    Creates a new simulation engine.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAgent(Agent agent)
    Adds an agent to the simulation.
    List<Agent>
    getAgents()
    Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
    long
    getCurrentTick()
    Returns the current simulation tick.
    Graph
    getGraph()
    Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
    void
    removeAgent(Agent agent)
    Removes an agent from the simulation.
    void
    tick()
    Advances the simulation by one tick.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationEngine

      public SimulationEngine(Graph graph)
      Creates a new simulation engine.
      Parameters:
      graph - graph used during the simulation

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentTick

      public long getCurrentTick()
      Returns the current simulation tick.
      Returns:
      current tick value

    • getGraph

      public Graph getGraph()
      Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
      Returns:
      simulation graph

    • getAgents

      public List<Agent> getAgents()
      Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
      Returns:
      list of agents

    • addAgent

      public void addAgent(Agent agent)
      Adds an agent to the simulation.
      Parameters:
      agent - agent to add

    • removeAgent

      public void removeAgent(Agent agent)
      Removes an agent from the simulation.
      Parameters:
      agent - agent to remove

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Advances the simulation by one tick. Each agent is updated once per tick.
